reviews.comment:
Mala atención de parte del bufé no funciona la maquina de café con leche, pedimos si nos podía calentar un sándwich no lo hizo. Y 9 menos 5 nos pidió que nos retiraramos porque cerraba. Además los costos muy elevados.

(Translated by Google)
The service at the buffet was terrible; the coffee machine wasn't working, and when we asked if they could heat up a sandwich, they refused. Then, at 9:55, they told us to leave because they were closing. On top of that, the prices were very high.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/15679973824289135347/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURHZ2N6eXZRRRAB
